name: Gunk- Play Dough
recipeInstructions:
WARNING: Non-Edible
1. Add green food coloring to the water until you reach your desired color, then stir it into the cornstarch.
2. Once the cornstarch is fully dissolved, pour the mixture onto a tray for children to play with.
3. This substance is nearly liquid in consistency, making it an exciting alternative to other types of dough.
4. Cleanup is effortless since it dries easily and can be swept up.
5. Any remaining mixture can be stored in a clean glass jar until you wish to use it again. It can then be reconstituted by adding water.
